desc: US-1 upload: ingest a sponsor .docx → create FeasibilityRequest with FormField[] + template fingerprint; inbox lists it
US-2 autofill action: run the orchestrator (shared in-process deps) on a received request and persist answers; workspace renders them
US-5 export: route renders the APPROVED answers to a filled .docx via render/docx.ts, guarded by render/diff (only approved ship)
US-6 learn: approving D indexes a PriorFormAnswer; a concept mapping writes a ConceptSynonym; the classifier consumes learned synonyms; test proves a learned synonym maps a previously-unmapped label
#4 ontology: concept-map + synonyms extended to ASCVD/IBD (CID-10 I21/E78/K50-51, LOINC, ATC) with PT-BR synonyms; ASCVD/IBD B-field label P/R test ≥0.8; no fabricated concept_ids
Tests: persist.ts + actions logic covered; round-trip test (docx→request→autofill→approve→render) asserts only approved ships + no patient id leaks; existing 336 stay green
autofill:e2e headless driver prints request id, N answers, approved count, rendered .docx bytes, cohort N
